backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing user profile management (CRUD operations with authorization checks) and DCF calculation endpoints (processDcf, calculateDcf) with input validation, present value computations, and risk-adjusted valuation logic.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module defining old and new actor types with userProfiles map; run function performs no-op migration as UserProfile type remains unchanged.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting five completed features: removal of View Formulas button, FormulasDialog component, Industry Growth Percentage field from form/interface/presets, and industryGrowthPercent references from formulas logic.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of 17 frontend files covering styling, utilities, DCF calculation engine, validation, presets, React components (form, results, actions), hooks (query sync, React Query integration, count-up animation), and build scripts; confirms industryGrowthPercent and View Formulas features have been removed.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles with OKLCH color system defining light/dark mode tokens for charcoal/ivory base colors and emerald accents with accessible contrast ratios.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with favicon, SEO meta tags, and document title 'Intri' for the DCF calculator application.
frontend/scripts/check-required-generate: Prebuild validation script that checks for required generated image assets (hero and icon) and exits with error if any are missing.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React component orchestrating the DCF calculator UI with header, calculator actions, CompanyInfoDisplay, input form, results section, and footer; FormulasDialog and related state removed.
frontend/src/components/BuyTargetPriceCa: Displays two styled cards showing buy price and target price with icons, gradients, and an optional warning message. Uses formatCurrency for price display and includes TrendingDown/TrendingUp icons.
frontend/src/components/CalculatorAction: Provides action buttons for the calculator: Use Example, Reset, Copy Shareable Link, and a development-only Run Dev Check button. Handles link copying with toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/CapitalReturnSec: Displays a card with four capital return metrics: yearly, quarterly, average, and capital return plus asset. Formats all values as currency and uses a gradient accent design.
frontend/src/components/CompanyInfoDispl: Conditionally renders a card displaying company information including share name, market cap, LTP, revenue, and net profit. Shows only if at least one field has data.
frontend/src/components/DcfInputsForm.ts: Form component for entering DCF calculation inputs including company snapshot, financial metrics, growth rates, and discount rates. Handles validation errors and numeric/percentage input parsing.
frontend/src/components/FormulasDialog.t: Modal dialog displaying all DCF formulas grouped by category (primary, intermediate, capital return, output). Shows formula name, expression, calculated value, and optional description for each.
Manages draft and live URL display/configuration for publishing the app. Includes URL validation, clipboard copying, and links to Caffeine dashboard with error handling and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/ResultsSection.t: React component that displays DCF calculation results with animated count-up effects, showing Buy and Target prices derived from intrinsic value and actual value calculations. Includes a calculate button, warning messages for zero values, and conditional rendering of results or placeholder content.
frontend/src/features/dcf/calculations.t: Exports functions to calculate intrinsic price and actual value per share using formulas from formulas.ts, and provides a helper to extract all hidden intermediate calculations into a structured object.
frontend/src/features/dcf/devChecks.ts: Development verification utility that runs DCF calculations against predefined verification inputs and compares results to expected values (intrinsic price: 107.12, actual value: 105.65) with tolerance-based matching and detailed console logging.
frontend/src/features/dcf/formulas.ts: Single source of truth for all Company Snapshot DCF formulas, defining a registry of 25+ intermediate and final calculations (Total Shares, Book Value, B-Q intermediates, capital returns, intrinsic price, actual value) with safe numeric handling and division helpers.
frontend/src/features/dcf/presets.ts: Defines the DcfInputs interface for company snapshot data (market cap, LTP, revenues, profits, ratios, holdings) and exports three preset configurations: DEFAULT_INPUTS (zeros), EXAMPLE_INPUTS, and VERIFICATION_INPUTS for testing.
frontend/src/features/dcf/validation.ts: Provides input validation for DcfInputs, checking for negative values, valid percentage ranges (0-100%), and whitespace-only strings, returning an array of ValidationError objects with field names and messages.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using Internet Identity, with automatic query invalidation when identity changes and optional admin token initialization from URL parameters.
frontend/src/hooks/useCountUp.ts: Custom React hook that animates numeric transitions using requestAnimationFrame with ease-out cubic easing, supporting configurable start/end values, duration, and decimal precision.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, providing login/logout functionality, identity state management, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useIsCallerAdmin.ts: Empty file, likely a placeholder for admin authorization checking logic.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocalStorage.ts: Custom React hook that provides a useState-like interface for persisting state in browser localStorage with JSON serialization and error handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hook that maps frontend DCF inputs to backend format and calls the actor's processDcf method, with default values for growth rate, cost of capital, and terminal years.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueryInputs.ts: Hook for syncing DCF calculator inputs with URL query parameters using abbreviated parameter names, supporting shareable links and backward compatibility for percentage values.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveCallerUserProf: Empty file, likely a placeholder for user profile persistence functionality.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color variables for light/dark themes using charcoal/ivory base with emerald accents, plus utility classes for hero headline gradients and glows.
frontend/src/lib/csv.ts: Empty file, likely a placeholder for CSV parsing or export utilities.
frontend/src/lib/format.ts: Utility functions for formatting numbers as INR currency, large currency with abbreviations (M/B/T), percentages, and comma-separated numbers.
frontend/src/lib/number.ts: Utility functions for safely parsing numeric and percentage inputs, treating empty strings as zero, and converting between decimal and percentage string formats.
frontend/src/lib/url.ts: URL validation and clipboard utilities providing safe HTTP(S) URL validation, clipboard copying with permission handling, and secure URL opening with pop-up blocker detection.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the main App component.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utilities for extracting URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence and functions to clear sensitive parameters from the URL.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining theme extensions including custom colors using OKLCH color space, typography, container queries, animations, and design tokens for a component library with sidebar and chart support.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file documenting completed and pending feature requests to remove the 'View formulas' button, FormulasDialog component, and industryGrowthPercent field from both frontend and backend components.
